description.en: Deals <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of the target's Max Health as fixed damage before attacking an enemy.
description.kr: 대상 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 만큼 고정 피해를 입힌 후 적을 공격합니다.
description.jp: 対象の最大HP<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の固定ダメージを与え、敵単体にダメージを与える。
description.zh: 对目标造成相当于其生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的固定伤害后,攻击敌人。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-100%</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-100%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-100%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. Inflicts <color=#28d9ed>instant death</color> on the target if the target's <color=#28d9ed>current Health</color> is below <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다. 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>현재 체력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 이하라면 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>즉사</color>시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。対象の<color=#28d9ed>残りHP</color>が<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>以下の場合、対象を<color=#28d9ed>即死</color>させる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人。若目标的<color=#28d9ed>当前生命值</color>在<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>以下,则使目标<color=#28d9ed>即死</color>。
